mapper.select: SELECT d.document_id AS documentId, d.announce_id AS announceId, d.title AS title, d.description AS description, COALESCE(mdc.status, 0) AS checked, a.announce_title AS announceTitle, a.reqst_end_date AS deadline, -- 🔑 공고 단위 총 문서 개수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document d2 WHERE d2.announce_id = d.announce_id) AS totalDocs, -- 🔑 공고 단위 체크된 문서 개수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_document_check mdc2 JOIN document d3 ON mdc2.document_id = d3.document_id WHERE d3.announce_id = d.announce_id AND mdc2.member_id = #{memberId} AND mdc2.status = 1) AS checkedDocs FROM document d JOIN announce a ON d.announce_id = a.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc ON d.document_id = mdc.document_id AND mdc.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE a.announce_id IN ( SELECT announce_id FROM member_favorite WHERE member_id = #{memberId} )

SELECT d.document_id AS documentId, d.announce_id AS announceId, d.title AS title, d.description AS description, COALESCE(mdc.status, 0) AS checked, a.announce_title AS announceTitle, a.reqst_end_date AS deadline, -- 🔑 공고 단위 총 문서 개수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document d2 WHERE d2.announce_id = d.announce_id) AS totalDocs, -- 🔑 공고 단위 체크된 문서 개수 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_document_check mdc2 JOIN document d3 ON mdc2.document_id = d3.document_id WHERE d3.announce_id = d.announce_id AND mdc2.member_id = #{memberId} AND mdc2.status = 1) AS checkedDocs FROM document d JOIN announce a ON d.announce_id = a.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc ON d.document_id = mdc.document_id AND mdc.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE d.announce_id = #{announceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_document_check (document_id, member_id, status, checked_at, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{memberId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), checked_at = NOW()
